title: How to Use Voice AI Chat Widget in GoHighLevel — Qualify Leads Instantly
description: Learn how to set up GoHighLevel's Voice AI Chat Widget to qualify leads instantly with human-like voice conversations. Step-by-step guide included.
html_content:
Imagine a prospect lands on your website at 2 AM, ready to buy—but your sales team is asleep. With GoHighLevel's Voice AI Chat Widget, that lead doesn't slip away. Instead, they have a natural, human-like voice conversation with your AI agent, get qualified instantly, and your team wakes up to a warm, pre-qualified prospect in their pipeline.

The Voice AI Chat Widget is a game-changer for agencies and businesses tired of losing leads to missed calls, slow response times, and clunky contact forms. It eliminates friction: no phone numbers to remember, no app downloads, no complex integrations. Just pure, browser-based voice engagement that works on any device.

In this guide, I'll walk you through exactly how to set up, configure, and deploy the Voice AI Chat Widget in GoHighLevel—so you can capture and qualify leads 24/7. Ready to transform your website into a lead-generation machine? Start your free 30-day GoHighLevel trial here—that's double the standard trial, no credit card required.

📋 In This Guide

  • What Is the Voice AI Chat Widget?
  • Key Benefits of Voice-Based Lead Qualification
  • How to Enable the Voice AI Chat Widget in Labs
  • Step-by-Step Setup: Configure Your AI Agent
  • Install the Widget on Your Website
  • Customize Widget Behavior and Call Recording
  • Testing and Deployment Best Practices

What Is the Voice AI Chat Widget?

The Voice AI Chat Widget is GoHighLevel's answer to the growing demand for voice-first, conversational experiences in lead generation, sales, and support. It allows any website visitor to hold a spoken conversation with an AI agent directly in their browser—using only a microphone and speakers. No phone calls required. No downloads. No friction.

Think of it as a virtual receptionist embedded in your website. When a prospect lands on your page, they see a small voice widget. They click it, start talking, and your AI agent engages them in a natural conversation. The AI qualifies them, answers common questions, and captures their information—all in real-time.

This is particularly powerful for agencies, SaaS companies, professional services, and e-commerce businesses that want to capture high-intent leads when prospects are actively browsing, not waiting for a callback.

Key Benefits of Voice-Based Lead Qualification

1. 24/7 Lead Capture Without Staff — Your AI agent works around the clock, qualifying leads even when your team is offline. No more missed opportunities at midnight or on weekends.

2. Higher Conversion Than Text Forms — Voice conversations feel more personal and engaging than typing into a contact form. Research shows voice interactions increase lead qualification rates by capturing more detailed information.

3. Instant Qualification Data — The AI asks qualifying questions, listens to responses, and automatically captures structured data in your CRM. Your sales team gets warm leads, not cold leads.

4. Reduced Customer Friction — Visitors don't need to remember phone numbers, find a form, or navigate a menu system. They just click and talk.

5. Concurrent Call Handling — Multiple visitors can have voice conversations simultaneously. The widget scales with your traffic without adding team overhead.

6. Browser-Based, No Downloads — It works on mobile, tablet, and desktop. No apps to install, no special software required.

Try GoHighLevel FREE for 30 Days

Double the standard trial. No credit card required to start.

Start My Free Trial →

How to Enable the Voice AI Chat Widget in Labs

The Voice AI Chat Widget is a premium feature housed in GoHighLevel's Labs section. Here's how to access and enable it:

Step 1: Log into your GoHighLevel account and navigate to Settings in the main menu.

Step 2: Look for Labs (or Experimental Features). This is where GoHighLevel stores cutting-edge, new-release features.

Step 3: Find Voice AI Chat Widget in the Labs list and toggle it ON. You'll see a confirmation message that the feature is now enabled for your account.

Step 4: Once enabled, the Voice AI option will appear in your main navigation menu. You're now ready to configure your first AI agent.

💡 Pro Tip

Not all GoHighLevel accounts have access to Voice AI yet. If you don't see it in Labs, your plan may not include this feature. Check your current plan or reach out to GoHighLevel support to confirm eligibility.

Step-by-Step Setup: Configure Your AI Agent

Step 1: Create a New Voice AI Agent

After enabling Voice AI in Labs, click Voice AI from your main menu. Select Create New Agent. You'll be taken to the configuration dashboard.

Step 2: Name Your AI Agent

Choose a name that reflects your business. Examples: "Sarah from [Company Name]," "Alex, Customer Success," or "Your AI Assistant." The name personalizes the experience and makes the conversation feel more natural.

Step 3: Configure the Prompt and Behavior

Write a custom system prompt that defines how your AI agent behaves. For example:

"You are a friendly sales representative for [Company Name]. Your job is to engage prospects, answer questions about our [service/product], and qualify them by asking about their needs, budget, and timeline. If they're qualified, offer to schedule a call with our team. Be conversational, warm, and helpful."

This prompt drives how the AI responds, the tone it uses, and what questions it asks.

Step 4: Set Qualifying Questions

Define 3-5 key qualifying questions your AI should ask. Examples:

  • What's your biggest challenge right now?
  • What's your budget range for solving this?
  • When are you looking to make a decision?
  • Are you the decision-maker, or will others be involved?

The AI will naturally work these questions into the conversation.

Install the Widget on Your Website

Step 1: Copy Your Widget Code

Once your AI agent is configured, GoHighLevel generates a unique embed code. Click Get Code and copy the script snippet provided.

Step 2: Install on Your Website

Paste this code into the footer or header of your website (just before the closing </body> tag). The widget works on:

  • GoHighLevel Funnels and Landing Pages
  • WordPress sites
  • Webflow, Wix, and other page builders
  • Custom HTML websites

Step 3: Test the Widget

Visit your website in a browser. You should see a small voice widget icon (usually a microphone in a chat bubble). Click it, allow microphone access when prompted, and test a conversation with your AI agent.

Customize Widget Behavior and Call Recording

Widget Appearance — Customize the color, position (bottom-right, bottom-left), and icon style to match your brand. The widget should feel native to your website, not like a third-party tool.

Call Recording Notices — GoHighLevel requires you to display a notice that conversations are being recorded (for legal compliance). You can customize the language of this notice to fit your brand voice.

Concurrent Call Limits — Depending on your plan, you may have a limit on how many simultaneous voice conversations can occur. Higher-tier plans support more concurrent calls, scaling with your traffic.

Call Routing — Configure where qualified leads are routed. You can send them to your CRM, trigger automation workflows, assign them to specific team members, or schedule follow-up tasks automatically.

Testing and Deployment Best Practices

1. Test Across Devices — Call the widget from desktop, mobile, and tablet to ensure audio quality and usability are consistent.

2. Monitor Call Quality — After deployment, listen to a few recorded calls. This helps you refine your AI's prompt and ensure it's asking the right questions.

3. Review Transcripts Weekly — GoHighLevel stores call transcripts in your CRM. Review them to identify patterns: What objections come up? What questions do prospects ask most? Use these insights to improve your prompt.

4. Start on High-Traffic Pages — Deploy the widget first on your homepage or main landing page where it'll get the most visibility. Once you have data, expand to other pages.

5. Set Expectations With Your Team — Make sure your sales team knows leads are coming in via voice AI. Brief them on how to follow up and what qualification data to expect.

6. A/B Test Your AI Agent Name and Tone — Try different agent names and prompt styles. Some audiences prefer formal, others casual. Track which approach generates more qualified leads.
